input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule V.1.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: v.1.4.1
            TITLE: ground clearance must be sufficient to prevent any portion of the vehicle except the tires

            CONTENT:
            rule V.1.4.1: Ground clearance must be sufficient to prevent any portion of the vehicle except the tires
V.1.4.1 Ground clearance must be sufficient to prevent any portion of the vehicle except the tires 
from touching the ground during dynamic events

final_answer: Ground clearance must be sufficient to prevent any portion of the vehicle except the tires from touching the ground during dynamic events
